label: Stat part (curve base)
description: Abstract intermediate schema for StatPart subclasses that evaluate a SimpleCurve. Not directly instantiable - use a concrete subclass such as StatPart_Health or StatPart_MetabolismTotal.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Piecewise linear curve evaluated by concrete subclasses to produce the stat modifier.
